description.en: Decorator to mark a callable as a coroutine function if it would not otherwise be detected by iscoroutinefunction(). This may be of use for sync functions that return a coroutine, if the function is passed to an API that requires iscoroutinefunction(). When possible, using an async def function is preferred. Also acceptable is calling the function and testing the return with iscoroutine(). Added in version 3.12.
